card_info.card_text:
The Pokémon TCG: Scarlet & Violet—Black Bolt Mini Tins includes:



2 Pokémon TCG: Scarlet & Violet— Black Bolt booster packs

Each booster pack contains 10 cards and 1 Basic Energy. Cards vary by pack.

1 art card matching the tin

1 coin

card_info.name: Black Bolt  Binder Collection Case
card_info.card_text:
Scarlet & Violet—Black Bolt

Reunite with the Pokémon of Unova and rise to the top as a Trainer in a land of unity and legends! Evolve first partner Snivy all the way to Serperior ex, and discover the inspiring power of ideals with the region's Legendary and Mythical Pokémon, including Zekrom ex and Meloetta ex. As you fill out your Pokédex, keep an eye out for special illustrations of each Pokémon and parallel cards with Poké Ball patterns in the Pokémon TCG: Scarlet & Violet—Black Bolt expansion!

Includes five Scarlet & Violet—Black Bolt or Scarlet & Violet—White Flare booster packs, respectively; and one nine-pocket album featuring Zekrom or Reshiram, respectively, to organize and store Pokémon TCG cards.
